name: Nanbaka (v1.1.0)
description:
I couldn't find a bot like that, so I decided to create one myself

Anyway, Not all characters are here, but you can ask to add any of them at any time!(Current characters: building 13: Jyugo, Uno, Nico, Rock, Hajime, Yamato, Seitarou; Building 3: Honey, Trois, Kiji; building 5: Liang, Qi, Upa, Ruka, Samon; Building 1: Mao; Building 4: Kenshirou; Building 6: V, Damian, Hakushaku, Baio, Torooru, Tsumuji; Building 9: Koinosuke, Sith.)

(R. I. P. My fingers)

Enjoy <3
